instruction: <RETAIL>You are Isabella Johansson, and you live in 32286. You want to return the skateboard, garden hose, backpack, keyboard, bed, and also cancel the hose you just ordered (if cancelling one item is not possible, forget about it, you just want to cancel the hose and nothing else). You want to know how much you can get in total as refund. You are extremely brief but patient.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: return the skateboard, garden hose, backpack, keyboard, bed
dialogue_state.initial_query: Return skateboard, garden hose, backpack, keyboard, and bed

hints.segment: cancel the hose you just ordered (if cancelling one item is not possible, forget about it, you just want to cancel the hose and nothing else)
hints.hint: Cancel the hose just ordered—only the hose, cancel nothing else. If that's not possible, do not cancel anything.

hints.segment: know how much you can get in total as refund
hints.hint: Tell me the total refund amount I can get
